description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set against a backdrop of large, natural boulders and surrounded by lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and a mix of glass and concrete exterior walls, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. Expansive windows and sliding glass doors are visible, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The house includes a spacious patio area, a swimming pool, and landscaped garden spaces, all enclosed by the rocky terrain for privacy. The driveway and walkway are paved, leading directly to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a covered porch and minimalist design elements. The overall layout emphasizes open, airy spaces and integration with the surrounding natural environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and lush landscaping, set against natural boulders. Features include a pool, patio, and a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and extensive landscaping with boulders behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, patio, and the house's integration with the rocky landscape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the boulder backdrop, large windows, and garden spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, palm trees, and the house's flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a covered porch, wide glass door, and paved walkway, framed by landscaping and subtle overhang.
